description: Create a flipchart in ActivInspire featuring a bar graph of rainfall data for Manaus, Brazil. The graph must include the title 'Manaus Rainfall', X and Y axes, and four vertical blue bars representing the following data: January (260 mm), February (240 mm), March (310 mm), and April (280 mm). Label the bars 'Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', and 'Apr' respectively, ensuring their heights accurately reflect the data trends. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/rainfall_graph.flipchart.
